'''âm-w-b''' ('''kamawab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machinize|machinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machinize|machinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-w-b
|-
! Lemma
| kamawab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimawab|thimawab]] || [[word:jimawab|jimawab]] || [[word:shimawab|shimawab]] || [[word:kimawab|kimawab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumawab|thuthumawab]] || [[word:jujumawab|jujumawab]] || [[word:shushumawab|shushumawab]] || [[word:kukumawab|kukumawab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumawab|thumawab]] || [[word:jumawab|jumawab]] || [[word:shumawab|shumawab]] || [[word:kumawab|kumawab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumawab|thumawab]] || [[word:jumawab|jumawab]] || [[word:shumawab|shumawab]] || [[word:kumawab|kumawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themawab|themawab]] || [[word:jemawab|jemawab]] || [[word:shemawab|shemawab]] || [[word:kemawab|kemawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomawab|thothomawab]] || [[word:jojomawab|jojomawab]] || [[word:shoshomawab|shoshomawab]] || [[word:kokomawab|kokomawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomawab|thomawab]] || [[word:jomawab|jomawab]] || [[word:shomawab|shomawab]] || [[word:komawab|komawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomawab|thomawab]] || [[word:jomawab|jomawab]] || [[word:shomawab|shomawab]] || [[word:komawab|komawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmawab|thĂŠmawab]] || [[word:jĂŠmawab|jĂŠmawab]] || [[word:shĂŠmawab|shĂŠmawab]] || [[word:kĂŠmawab|kĂŠmawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamawab|thathamawab]] || [[word:jajamawab|jajamawab]] || [[word:shashamawab|shashamawab]] || [[word:kakamawab|kakamawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamawab|thamawab]] || [[word:jamawab|jamawab]] || [[word:shamawab|shamawab]] || [[word:kamawab|kamawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamawab|thamawab]] || [[word:jamawab|jamawab]] || [[word:shamawab|shamawab]] || [[word:kamawab|kamawab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamawab|shamawab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamawab|goshamawab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamawab|gokishamawab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamawabnĂŒ|shamawabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamawabnknĂŒ|goshamawabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamawabnĂŒ|gokishamawabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamawabshĂ«|shamawabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamawabnkshĂ«|goshamawabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamawabshĂ«|gokishamawabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamawabro|shamawabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamawabnkro|goshamawabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamawabro|gokishamawabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamawabmu|shamawabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamawabnkmu|goshamawabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamawabmu|gokishamawabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamawabsher|shamawabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamawabnksher|goshamawabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamawabsher|gokishamawabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamawabng|shamawabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamawabnkng|goshamawabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamawabng|gokishamawabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamawabya|shamawabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamawabnkya|goshamawabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamawabya|gokishamawabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamawabyam|shamawabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamawabnkyam|goshamawabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamawabyam|gokishamawabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamawabnĂŒshĂ«|shamawabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamawabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamawabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamawabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamawabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamawabnĂŒro|shamawabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamawabnknĂŒro|goshamawabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamawabnĂŒro|gokishamawabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamawabnĂŒmu|shamawabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamawabnknĂŒmu|goshamawabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamawabnĂŒmu|gokishamawabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamawabshĂ«nĂŒ|shamawabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamawabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamawabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamawabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamawabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamawabshĂ«ro|shamawabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamawabnkshĂ«ro|goshamawabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamawabshĂ«ro|gokishamawabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamawabshĂ«mu|shamawabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamawabnkshĂ«mu|goshamawabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamawabshĂ«mu|gokishamawabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamawabronĂŒ|shamawabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamawabnkronĂŒ|goshamawabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamawabronĂŒ|gokishamawabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamawabroshĂ«|shamawabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamawabnkroshĂ«|goshamawabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamawabroshĂ«|gokishamawabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamawabromu|shamawabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamawabnkromu|goshamawabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamawabromu|gokishamawabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamawabmunĂŒ|shamawabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamawabnkmunĂŒ|goshamawabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamawabmunĂŒ|gokishamawabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamawabmushĂ«|shamawabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamawabnkmushĂ«|goshamawabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamawabmushĂ«|gokishamawabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamawabmuro|shamawabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamawabnkmuro|goshamawabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamawabmuro|gokishamawabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
